name: Neocron RenoDX Engine — HLSL pixel-shader injection
author: Neocron Community
description: ReShade Add-on Edition .addon32 that hooks D3D9 create_pipeline to substitute Neocron's world.ps (CRC 0x2ccf5eb7) with a runtime-compiled HLSL replacement. Tier 4 of the remaster — engine-level shader injection. v0.1 ships milestone 2: PS identification + HLSL compile via d3dcompiler_47.dll + create_pipeline substitution. Replacement currently mirrors vanilla (albedo × lightmap × 2). Real per-texture normal-mapped lighting is m3+, blocked on the AI normal-map corpus generated by the sibling _normal_pipeline/ project.
